name: Krayt Fang

modifications.name: Maneuvering Jet Overhaul
modifications.summary: Evasive Maneuvers success also grants [Cover 1] alongside [Elusive].

modifications.name: Brace for Impact
modifications.summary: Evade reaction gains a failure floor — reduces attacker's Effect Tier by 1 even on a miss.

modifications.name: The Corellian Wake
modifications.summary: Control 8+ bonus on all Handling actions doubled to +2 Effect Tiers. Threading impossible gaps in hazardous terrain.

modifications.name: Overtuned Sublight Drive
modifications.summary: All zone movement +1. Fly, Attack Run, and Dogfight disengage each move one extra zone.

modifications.name: Strafing Thrusters
modifications.summary: On Attack Run, pay -1 tier. Ship repositions 1 zone in any direction after the run resolves.

modifications.name: Class Zero Hyperdrive
modifications.summary: Half hyperspace travel time. Cannot be caught. Unlocks Micro-Jump (Engines power die — engine sputter failure).

modifications.name: Polarized Deflectors
modifications.summary: Endure vs energy weapons has Shields die [Optimized]. No benefit against ordnance or kinetic.

modifications.name: Regenerative Cycling
modifications.summary: Start of each round, if no [Buffered], automatically gain [Buffered 1]. Does not stack.

modifications.name: Impenetrable Baffles
modifications.summary: Reinforce Shields grants +1 extra buffer at every tier. Fleeting→[Buffered 2], Masterful→[Buffered 3], Legendary→[Buffered 4].

modifications.name: Targeting Uplink
modifications.summary: Gunner's Control die [Optimized] when attacking a target the Operator has successfully Scanned.

modifications.name: Sensor Prioritization
modifications.summary: Operator declares Offensive or Defensive Priority mode. Chosen side is [Empowered], other side loses sensor buffs.

modifications.name: Crystal Gravfield Trap
modifications.summary: System-wide scan range. Detects hidden/cloaked ships. Scan 8+ bonus doubled to +2 Effect Tiers.

notes: Modified YT-1300 light freighter. Fully upgraded to D12 across all systems for testing purposes (breaks the one-D12-system rule). Loaded with the Corellian Wake (precision flying), Class Zero Hyperdrive (speed + Micro-Jump), Impenetrable Baffles (shield fortress), and Crystal Gravfield Trap (all-seeing sensors). She may not look like much, but she's got it where it counts.
